typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: VAL-APP-004 suggested-option test expects non-error for empty answer and contradicts production empty-answer validation, so required behavior is not proven.
VAL-APP-005 tests are weak/vacuous (feedback presence and broad tone checks) and do not assert required done/snooze/calendar state mutations or visibility gating.
VAL-BRIEF-002 test includes a vacuous `XCTAssertTrue(true)` and does not enforce the singleton Next Operator Question card invariant or deterministic quick-answer ordering.
VAL-EXT-009 evidence path runs/responds to run approvals (`respondToApproval`) instead of mission approve/answer actions required by the validation contract.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit pre-handoff checklist item that verification evidence must include every feature verificationStep command and assertion surface verbatim, with failure if any required surface is omitted.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of m13-canonical-fleet-inbox-model found handoff command coverage omitted required app and daemon-RPC validations while the skill states these surfaces are required.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require full commit hash resolvability verification (`git rev-parse --verify <full-hash>`) in worker handoffs, not only short-hash checks, before reporting commit evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review found handoff recorded a non-resolvable full hash while only the short prefix resolved, which weakens provenance reliability.

orchestratorOverride.reason: User requested: stop the test and do not run it again.
